message:
feat(plan): add detailed side condition verification for TimeoutMin and DedupRaceJoin

Rewrite side conditions (rewrite.rs):
- TimeoutMin: Verify nested Timeout[Timeout[child, inner], outer] rewrites
  to Timeout[child, min(inner, outer)] with correct duration calculation
- DedupRaceJoin: Verify Race[Join[a,x], Join[b,x]] → Join[Race[a,b], x]
  pattern with intersection calculation and child validation
- Both rules now have complete structural verification

Additional concurrent agent changes:
- consistent_hash.rs: Minor formatting
- lyapunov.rs: Minor formatting
- fixtures.rs: Added import
- raptorq/tests.rs: Test adjustments
- benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs: New benchmark file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
